query: Design the user journeys and screens for a simple note-taking web app (create, edit, search, delete notes) using UXLoom. Iterate until validation is clean.
expected_behavior: Initializes a UXLoom project and produces a uxloom.project.json file
Defines at least one journey with an entry state and at least one final state
Every non-final journey state has outgoing events, including at least one failure or back path
Every screen contract includes empty, loading, and error states, or carries a written exemption
Final project validates with zero errors
